_publications._publicationTitle: RENOVO-NF1 accurately predicts NF1 missense variant pathogenicity.

_contextSnippet: On the 2025 validation set 2, accuracy was 93.33%, with only 1/15 variants interpreted as uncertain by RENOVO
details: Achieved 93.33% accuracy on validation set 2 (n=15), with only 1/15 variants interpreted as uncertain
